data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Severity label — informational tier in scheduling context.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Severity label — warning in scheduling context; non-blocking.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Severity label — error in scheduling context; blocking failure.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Severity label — critical in scheduling context; capacity risk.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Action verb — save a schedule entry (event/allocation/calendar item). Pilot string for cluster-B cascade proof. Imperative.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Action verb — dismiss/abort on schedule edit dialogs and view-switch flows.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Action verb — retry after a save, sync, or recurrence-expansion failure.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] Translator: Empty-state placeholder while schedule data loads. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis preserved.
